allow: PowerShell($token = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("GITHUB_TOKEN", "User"\); if \($token\) { Write-Output "Token found" } else { Write-Output "No token" })
PowerShell($helper = git config --global credential.helper; Write-Output "Helper: $helper"; $managerOutput = git credential-manager get 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Output $managerOutput)
